action.reasoning: Observation: eval failed with device mismatch: directions (CPU) and focal_length (CUDA). Analysis: predict.py's get_rays_for_view does not move directions_unit_focal to device, while focal_length is on device. In fix_test.py we successfully moved it. Decision: fix predict.py by ensuring all tensors in get_rays_for_view are on same device, then test locally on one val object to confirm no errors. Then submit eval to get improved LPIPS from target-camera rendering.
